description: A high school math teacher needs to finalize semester grades in ~/Documents/math_grades.xlsx. For the student data in rows 2 through 51, calculate the 'Weighted Average' in column F using weights of 10% for Quiz Average (Column B), 20% for Homework Average (Column C), 30% for Midterm Exam (Column D), and 40% for Final Exam (Column E). Assign a 'Letter Grade' in column G based on the weighted average: A (>= 90), B (>= 80), C (>= 70), D (>= 60), and F (< 60). Additionally, generate a Class Statistics summary starting at row 53 that includes the 'Class Average', 'Highest Score', 'Lowest Score', and 'Passing Count' (students with a score >= 60). Save the updated spreadsheet to ~/Documents/math_grades.xlsx.
